summary: Re-tested InfraGenie auth + onboarding + dashboard end-to-end after Step 5 'Done' bug fix. ALL critical flows PASS. Step 5 'Done' screen now renders correctly. Fix in Onboarding.jsx (moving refreshUser() into StepDone.goDashboard click handler) works as intended. Backend was skipped per request (already 14/14 pass in iter-2).
critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding.jsx is ~604 lines; nearing the 700-line guideline. Recommend splitting StepCompany/StepAzure/StepAi/StepExtract/StepDone into separate files under /pages/onboarding/.
Brute-force lockout after 5 failed login attempts (mentioned in playbook_testing_instructions) is NOT implemented on /api/auth/login. Carried over from iter-2; not in scope of this fix.
POST /api/auth/logout does not require an authenticated session (carry-over from iter-2). Low-risk but technically should reject unauthenticated requests.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@chatops.com / admin123. New QA users created via /api/auth/register with qa+<random>@example.com / Test1234! (EmailStr rejects .test TLD).
seed_data_creation: Created 2 fresh QA users during this iteration (qa+<rand>@example.com) and ran admin through onboarding once. Admin onboarding_complete is now true again in MongoDB. Other QA users from iter-2 remain. Safe to purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 19 frontend assertions in the e2e Playwright run passed: signup→/onboarding, Step 5 renders 'You\'re all set, QA!' + 4 stat cards + Go to Dashboard button, click navigates to /dashboard with sidebar/topbar showing 'QA Test', /api/auth/me returns 401 after logout, completed user on /onboarding redirects to /dashboard, wrong password returns 401, duplicate email returns 409, admin flow works identically. Step 5 is now fully reachable end-to-end. The Onboarding.jsx redirect useEffect (lines 42-45) is still in place but no longer races with refreshUser because refreshUser is only invoked on user click in StepDone.goDashboard. No regressions detected.

verified_test_cases.dashboard_KPI_cards_render: PASS (21 kpi-* testids found, includes 5 overview KPIs visible in screenshot)

rca of the issue: N/A — Step 5 bug from iter-2 has been resolved. Fix: refreshUser() removed from runExtraction() and moved into StepDone.goDashboard() click handler. The top-level redirect useEffect no longer fires post-extraction because the AuthContext user.onboarding_complete stays false in the frontend until the user explicitly clicks Go to Dashboard. Verified by visual confirmation (screenshot of Step 5 with 4 stat cards + button), URL assertion (page.url stays at /onboarding after extraction completes), and successful subsequent navigation to /dashboard upon click.
